questions.question: What does 今天 mean?
questions.explanation: 今天 (jīntiān) = today. 明天 = tomorrow, 昨天 = yesterday.

questions.question: What does 星期三 mean?
questions.explanation: 星期 + N = the Nth weekday counting from Monday. 星期三 = Wednesday.

questions.question: Which is the pinyin for 点 (used in clock time)?
Which character is the time-unit for 'year'?
questions.explanation: 年 (nián) = year. 月 = month, 日 = day, 星期 = week.

questions.question: Which is the measure word for cups of tea or water?
questions.explanation: 杯 (bēi) = cup/glass. 一杯水 = a glass of water, 两杯茶 = two cups of tea.

questions.question: Which character is used in writing for 'date number' (e.g. '3rd of the month')?
questions.explanation: 号 (hào) is used in speech, 日 (rì) is used in formal writing. 三号 / 三日 = the 3rd.

questions.question: What measure word fits 一__人 (one [household member])?
questions.explanation: When counting members of a household, the special MW 口 is used: 我家有四口人 = there are four people in my family.
